title: Safe Movement
subtitle: Building awareness in your daily routine
description: At this early stage, adopting safe and mindful daily habits can help reduce unnecessary risks. Small adjustments in movement and environment can support a smoother journey ahead.
what_to_expect: No major physical limitations yet, but awareness becomes important
Early pregnancy requires cautious and balanced activity
Body sensitivity may gradually increase over time
daily_safety_tips: Avoid lifting heavy objects or sudden jerky movements
Maintain proper posture while sitting and standing
movement_guidelines: Engage in light physical activity such as walking
Listen to your body and stop if discomfort occurs
environmental_awareness: Avoid exposure to harmful chemicals or strong fumes
Ensure proper ventilation in living spaces
Be cautious on slippery or uneven surfaces
travel_safety: Limit unnecessary travel during early stages
Avoid long periods of continuous sitting without movement
important_note: Early awareness and small precautions can help prevent avoidable strain or risks.
reassurance: Simple, mindful actions can make your daily routine safer and more comfortable.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider before starting or modifying any physical activity.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining safe activity levels can help support stable blood sugar management.
movement_guidelines: Engage in light, regular activity like short walks
Avoid skipping meals before physical activity
diabetes.safety_focus: Be mindful of signs of low energy or dizziness during activity.
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced movement can support both safety and stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Low energy levels may require extra caution during physical activity.
anemia.safety_focus: Watch for signs like dizziness or fatigue during activity.
anemia.reassurance: Gentle and mindful movement helps conserve your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Controlled and gentle activity can support stable blood pressure.
movement_guidelines: Avoid sudden or intense physical exertion
hypertension.safety_focus: Avoid stress-inducing or physically demanding environments.
hypertension.reassurance: Slow and steady routines support better balance.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining a balanced activity level supports overall metabolic stability.
movement_guidelines: Maintain a consistent daily activity pattern
thyroid.safety_focus: Pay attention to unusual fatigue or restlessness.
thyroid.reassurance: Moderation in movement helps maintain balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, prioritizing safe and moderate movement becomes essential.
priority_guidelines: Maintain a steady and moderate activity level
Be attentive to body signals during movement
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Careful and consistent movement can support your overall safety.
